data.body:
FOUNDATION DONE (commits 89f5c7de + 7480964c, local main). Lint/format now reliably configured + wired into CI:

DONE:
- acli.py F811 fixed (dropped 5 dead re-exported free-fn imports that collided with the same-named AcliClient methods; methods delegate via qualified acli_cli_ops.<name>, no caller uses the free form). The gating 'ruff check src tests' set is GREEN again. Behavior-preserving: 939 reconciler/bridge tests pass + a live DIG bridge-probe passed all 6 steps.
- [tool.ruff.format] configured (ruff recommended/Black-compatible defaults, line-length 100); 'ruff format' applied across the tree (266 files); 'ruff format --check src tests' GATES in CI.
- CI test.yml: added the format-check gating step; wired the integration tier ('pytest -m integration' — concurrency + reconciler, network-guarded/mocked, CI-safe, verified 8 pass with creds stripped) so the full suite runs in CI; removed the obsolete jq install step + bash-suite references; dropped .sh from the module-size scan.
- Made one fragile test formatting-invariant (applier._LEAVES real-body heuristic: source-line-count -> AST statement-count) — surfaced by the reformat.
- Full suite green: broad 1662 passed/0 failed; integration 8 passed.

REMAINING (the recommended-lint-RULES gating ratchet — AC 'ruff check (recommended set) passes with no errors'): promoting select=[E,F,W,I,UP,B] to gating needs ~415 violations fixed first: 197 E501 (line-too-long, manual reflows), 136 F401 (unused-import — mostly reconciler re-export facades; needs __all__ per the pyproject note), 38 I001 (import-order, auto-fixable), 11 E702, 8 B007, 8 E402, 7 F841, 4 F811, 3 B017, 2 B904, 1 B905. ~169 auto-fixable. Suggested next: auto-fix I001/safe-F401, add __all__ to the reconciler facades, reflow E501, then promote rules to gating incrementally (the advisory CI step already tracks the counts). Leaving this ticket in_progress for that ratchet.
